mechanism: Broad-spectrum TKI with activity against FLT3
Pan-HDAC inhibition leading to epigenetic modulation and apoptosis
Inhibits protein synthesis by interfering with ribosomal elongation
Selective inhibitor of MEK1/2 in the MAPK pathway
Inhibits mitochondrial protein translation in leukemic cells
Inhibits thioredoxin reductase, increasing oxidative stress
Disrupts oxidative phosphorylation and modulates Wnt/STAT3 signaling

additional_notes: Activity enhanced by low-µM Cu2+ (e.g., 0.5–1 µM)
